name: Cute Chibi Matryoshka Dolls
body:
---
title: Cute Chibi Matryoshka Dolls (Girl with a Pearl Earring)
category: 3d
tags:
  - chibi
  - cute
  - 3d
author: '[@ZHO_ZHO_ZHO](https://x.com/ZHO_ZHO_ZHO)'
preview: /media/3d/cute-chibi-matryoshka-dolls-girl-with-a-pearl-earr.webp
---

Transform the person in the image into a set of cute chibi-style Russian nesting dolls (🪆), with a total of five dolls arranged from largest to smallest. Place them on an elegant wooden table. Horizontal aspect ratio: 3:2.

## Reference Image
Requires uploading a person's image as the subject for transformation (The original post used ['Girl with a Pearl Earring'](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=55017931)).

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/ZHO_ZHO_ZHO/status/1911669883315818497)

## Example Output
![Cute Chibi Matryoshka Dolls (Girl with a Pearl Earring)](/media/3d/cute-chibi-matryoshka-dolls-girl-with-a-pearl-earr.webp)
description_en: Image-generation prompt that transforms an uploaded portrait into a set of five chibi Russian nesting dolls on a wooden table.
description_zh: 图像生成提示词，把上传的人像转成木桌上一套五个的 Q 版俄罗斯套娃。
long_en: Renders the subject as five chibi-style matryoshka dolls arranged largest to smallest in a 3:2 horizontal frame. Requires an image model that accepts a reference photo.
long_zh: 把主体渲染成由大到小排列的五个 Q 版套娃，采用 3:2 横幅构图。需要支持参考图的图像模型。
sec_note_en: Requires an image-generation model and an uploaded personal photo that is sent to a third-party service.
sec_note_zh: 需要图像生成模型，并将上传的个人照片发送给第三方服务。
